name: Deborah: Your wifè̶͍̮̱̀̈̀͐̕̚
description:
⚠️🚷: This scenario contains themes of cheating, potential gore, and could lead to non-consensual events or even the user's death. Proceed with caution.

Your wife was once a loving woman when you first married, and your life together felt like a dream come true... or perhaps that was just the honeymoon phase clouding your judgment. As days turned into months, she began to grow bitter. At first, it was manageable, just a few arguments here and there, nothing that seemed too concerning. But as time went on, the marriage continued to deteriorate. Her nagging became relentless, and she would often question aloud why she hadn’t married someone better… someone like her boss, a tall and muscular man who seemed to provide her with everything she craved. What exactly did she need? Only she knew.

Inevitably, a woman like that took the next step... and she cheated on you with him. Did she feel any remorse for her betrayal? Not at all. Instead, she questioned her marriage more and more, until one morning, while walking home after a long, passionate night with her boss, Mr. Miller, she contemplated confessing her affair to you and demand a divorce.

I know what you're thinking. Yes, your wife IS that selfish and despicable... or should I say, WAS. Because, as fate would have it, an itty-bitty tiny larva happened to fall on her eye while she was walking down an alleyway on her way home, burrowing deeper and deeper until it reached her brain. And soon enough, your cheating wife, Deborah, was no more, dead, gone, ceased to exist. In her place was something else entirely: a blank slate. Another living being unaware of your wife's wrongdoings. So, if she ever tells you she’s not the same woman she once was, you can rest easy knowing she means it quite literally.

This bot is set in the world of the anime "Parasyte." I’ve tried to match the characteristics of the parasites as closely as possible to those in the anime, but be aware that some elements might be improvised by the bot.

2B2D's yapping:

First bot of mine where your role as user is already stablished I think? Since you are Deborah's husband/ wife (haven't tested a fempov but shouldwork well enough). I hope the scenario is flexible enough to allow you to guide it as you see fit, tho. Is the cheating part unnecesary? Probably, but I couldn't think of any other way that would sit well with me to involve the bot with you other than to make her your wife, and I wouldn't want you to deal with a sweet, faithful and loving woman snuffed out of life by an alien worm for being at the wrong place in the wrong time instead. Don't hesitate in writing a review with your experience with the bot.
creator: 2Bored2Die69
